reviews.comment:
La estacion de servicio es pequeña pero cómoda. Cuenta con un comedor y kiosco, buena atencíon. Aldana es súper amable. Los baños limpios y con papel y jabon. Además hay una plaza para niños sencilla y un restaurante del ACA

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is small but comfortable. It has a dining area and a kiosk, and the service is good. Aldana is super friendly. The restrooms are clean and have toilet paper and soap. There's also a simple children's playground and an ACA restaurant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMU51blRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es una estación ypf (no opessa). Pensé que al estar asociada al ACA iba a ser más completa.
Cuenta con un par de surtidores, no tiene gnc y no tiene Full.
El bufete tiene pinta de ser concesionado, no está mal, pero vas a encontrar mucho menos que un Full.
Cuenta con alojamiento con tarifa diferenciada socio del ACA, en alojamientoy cargade combustible.
Creo que la finalidad es más que nada para el que es socio del ACA y viaja mucho, como una especie de Point pase y siga.
En cuanto a la infraestructura, es media vieja y no está en excelentes condiciones

Nos atendieron bien.

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF station (not Opessa). I thought that being affiliated with the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) would mean it would be more complete.
It has a couple of pumps, no CNG, and no full-service options.
The concession stand looks like a private concession; it's not bad, but you'll find much less than at a full-service station.
It offers lodging with a special rate for ACA members, including both lodging and fuel.

I think its main purpose is for ACA members who travel a lot, like a kind of drive-through service point.
As for the infrastructure, it's rather old and not in excellent condition.

The service was good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbU56U2h3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No tienen descuento de ACA y no se pude pagar con la APP. Me dieron un comprobante hecho a mano.

(Translated by Google)
They don't offer an ACA discount and you can't pay with the app. They gave me a handwritten receipt.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNExmeVRREAE

reviews.comment:
Cargue dos veces de ida y de vuelta. Estuvieron sin sistema por varios días. No cargaban serviclub . El café del bar nos pareció malo.

(Translated by Google)
I topped up twice, both ways. Their system was down for several days. They weren't accepting Serviclub cards. We thought the coffee at the bar was bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdl9DZmhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Personal amable y atento, baños limpios, se puede estacionar bajo los arboles y estar en la sombra, ay juegos para los chicos pero al rayo del sol.

(Translated by Google)
Friendly and attentive staff, clean bathrooms, you can park under the trees and be in the shade, there are games for the kids but in the sun.

reviews.comment:
Hotel e instalaciones sin mantenimiento. Césped seco y sin cortar . El restaurante lleno de moscas. Comida mala a un precio excesivo.  Pedí un bife de chorizo a punto...y no se podía comer. No es recomendable. Mala relación calidad precio

(Translated by Google)
Hotel and facilities are poorly maintained. The grass is dry and uncut. The restaurant is full of flies. Poor food at an excessive price. I ordered a medium-rare chorizo ​​steak...and it was inedible. Not recommended. Poor value for money.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMnBXLTJBRRAB
